'''wadhumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearmonging|fearmonging]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearmonging|fearmonging]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wadhumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædhimith|wædhimith]] || [[word:wædhimij|wædhimij]] || [[word:wædhimish|wædhimish]] || [[word:wædhimi|wædhimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wadhudhumuth|wadhudhumuth]] || [[word:wadhudhumuj|wadhudhumuj]] || [[word:wadhudhumush|wadhudhumush]] || [[word:wadhudhumu|wadhudhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wadhumuth|wadhumuth]] || [[word:wadhumuj|wadhumuj]] || [[word:wadhumush|wadhumush]] || [[word:wadhumu|wadhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadhufmuth|wadhufmuth]] || [[word:wadhufmuj|wadhufmuj]] || [[word:wadhufmush|wadhufmush]] || [[word:wadhufmuf|wadhufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wadhumuthu|wadhumuthu]] || [[word:wadhumuju|wadhumuju]] || [[word:wadhumushu|wadhumushu]] || [[word:wadhumuku|wadhumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wadhumuth|wadhumuth]] || [[word:wadhumuj|wadhumuj]] || [[word:wadhumush|wadhumush]] || [[word:wadhumu|wadhumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wadhumuthul|wadhumuthul]] || [[word:wadhumujul|wadhumujul]] || [[word:wadhumushul|wadhumushul]] || [[word:wadhumukul|wadhumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wadhumuthuthu|wadhumuthuthu]] || [[word:wadhumujuju|wadhumujuju]] || [[word:wadhumushushu|wadhumushushu]] || [[word:wadhumuku|wadhumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wadhumuthun|wadhumuthun]] || [[word:wadhumujun|wadhumujun]] || [[word:wadhumushun|wadhumushun]] || [[word:wadhumukun|wadhumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wadhumuthuoro|wadhumuthuoro]] || [[word:wadhumujuoro|wadhumujuoro]] || [[word:wadhumushuoro|wadhumushuoro]] || [[word:wadhumukuoro|wadhumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
